requirement_topic.en: EMC, Electrical Safety and Wireless Approval — GSA conformity and NCA type approval (no CE mark in Ghana)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容、电气安全与无线核准——GSA合格评定与NCA型号核准（加纳无CE标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容、電氣安全與無線核准——GSA合格評定與NCA型號核准（迦納無CE標誌）

summary.en: Ghana does not use the EU CE mark. Electrical safety and electromagnetic compatibility for lithium batteries and power banks are addressed through Ghana Standards Authority （GSA） conformity assessment against the relevant GS/IEC standards, enforced by destination inspection at ports such as Tema and Takoradi. Any product with a wireless function （for example a power bank with Bluetooth or a battery with an embedded radio module） additionally requires type approval from the National Communications Authority （NCA） before it can be lawfully imported and sold. Mains chargers and adapters supplied with the product must also meet the applicable GS/IEC electrical-safety standards; note that Ghana operates a 230 V / 50 Hz grid, so the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
summary.zh: 加纳不使用欧盟CE标志。锂电池及移动电源的电气安全和电磁兼容，通过加纳标准局（GSA）依据相关GS/IEC标准进行的合格评定处理，并在特马（Tema）、塔科拉迪（Takoradi）等港口以到岸检验执行。任何具备无线功能的产品（例如带蓝牙的移动电源或内置无线电模块的电池）还须在合法进口和销售前取得国家通信管理局（NCA）的型号核准。随附的市电充电器和适配器也须符合适用的GS/IEC电气安全标准；须注意加纳采用230 V/50 Hz电网，频率50 Hz与中国一致，但标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V。
summary.zht: 迦納不使用歐盟CE標誌。鋰電池及行動電源的電氣安全和電磁相容，透過迦納標準局（GSA）依據相關GS/IEC標準進行的合格評定處理，並在特馬（Tema）、塔科拉迪（Takoradi）等港口以到岸檢驗執行。任何具備無線功能的產品（例如帶藍牙的行動電源或內置無線電模組的電池）還須在合法進口和銷售前取得國家通訊管理局（NCA）的型號核准。隨附的市電充電器和轉接器也須符合適用的GS/IEC電氣安全標準；須注意迦納採用230 V/50 Hz電網，頻率50 Hz與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection against GS/IEC electrical-safety and EMC standards
National Communications Authority (NCA) type approval for equipment with radio/wireless functionality (Electronic Communications Act, 2008 (Act 775))

summary.en: In China, electrical safety and EMC for finished electronic products are addressed through national GB standards and, where the product is in the CCC catalogue, the CCC compulsory certification scheme; wireless devices require a State Radio Regulation （SRRC） type-approval and related radio-transmission-equipment approval. A Chinese CCC certificate or SRRC approval evidences domestic compliance only. Neither the CCC mark nor SRRC approval is recognised by GSA or NCA, and there is no Chinese equivalent of the CE mark; Ghana relies on GSA conformity assessment plus NCA type approval rather than a self-declared conformity mark.
summary.zh: 在中国，成品电子产品的电气安全和EMC通过国家GB标准处理，若产品在CCC目录内则适用CCC强制性认证；无线设备须取得国家无线电管理（SRRC）型号核准及相关无线电发射设备核准。中国CCC证书或SRRC核准仅证明国内合规。CCC标志和SRRC核准均不被GSA或NCA认可，且不存在与CE标志对应的中国制度；加纳依靠GSA合格评定加NCA型号核准，而非自我声明的合格标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，成品電子產品的電氣安全和EMC透過國家GB標準處理，若產品在CCC目錄內則適用CCC強制性認證；無線設備須取得國家無線電管理（SRRC）型號核准及相關無線電發射設備核准。中國CCC證書或SRRC核准僅證明國內合規。CCC標誌和SRRC核准均不被GSA或NCA認可，且不存在與CE標誌對應的中國制度；迦納依靠GSA合格評定加NCA型號核准，而非自我聲明的合格標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC compulsory product certification scheme (where the finished product is in the CCC catalogue)
SRRC type approval / radio transmission equipment approval for wireless devices (MIIT)

gap.en: There is no CE mark in Ghana, so exporters cannot rely on an EU-style self-declared conformity mark. Key gaps: (1) electrical-safety and EMC conformity must be shown to GSA against GS/IEC standards through conformity assessment and destination inspection, which a Chinese CCC certificate does not complete; (2) any wireless function triggers a separate NCA type approval that is independent of GSA and of Chinese SRRC approval; (3) supplied chargers/adapters must be rated for a 230 V / 50 Hz grid — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so input ratings and plug/safety marking should be checked. Exporters should confirm GSA scope, prepare GS/IEC test evidence, and obtain NCA type approval before shipment where any radio function exists.
gap.zh: 加纳没有CE标志，出口商不能依赖欧盟式自我声明合格标志。主要差距：（1）电气安全和EMC合规须通过合格评定与到岸检验向GSA依据GS/IEC标准证明，中国CCC证书无法完成；（2）任何无线功能都会触发独立于GSA及中国SRRC核准的NCA型号核准；（3）随附充电器/适配器须适配230 V/50 Hz电网——频率50 Hz与中国一致，但标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V，故应核查输入额定值及插头/安全标识。出口商应确认GSA范围、准备GS/IEC测试证据，并在存在任何无线电功能时于装运前取得NCA型号核准。
gap.zht: 迦納沒有CE標誌，出口商不能依賴歐盟式自我聲明合格標誌。主要差距：（1）電氣安全和EMC合規須透過合格評定與到岸檢驗向GSA依據GS/IEC標準證明，中國CCC證書無法完成；（2）任何無線功能都會觸發獨立於GSA及中國SRRC核准的NCA型號核准；（3）隨附充電器/轉接器須適配230 V/50 Hz電網——頻率50 Hz與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V，故應核查輸入額定值及插頭/安全標識。出口商應確認GSA範圍、準備GS/IEC測試證據，並在存在任何無線電功能時於裝運前取得NCA型號核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — GSA conformity assessment for electrical safety/EMC, plus NCA type approval for any wireless function; no CE mark used in Ghana
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC (where in catalogue) and SRRC type approval (for wireless) under the SAMR/MIIT framework

source.publisher: National Communications Authority (NCA), Ghana — Type Approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana does not use the CE mark; electrical-safety and EMC conformity for lithium batteries and power banks is shown to GSA against GS/IEC standards via conformity assessment and destination inspection, and any wireless function additionally requires NCA type approval. Chinese CCC or SRRC approval evidences domestic compliance only and is not recognised by GSA or NCA. Exporters should confirm GSA scope, prepare GS/IEC evidence, verify 230 V / 50 Hz charger ratings, and obtain NCA type approval where applicable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳不使用CE标志；锂电池及移动电源的电气安全和EMC合规通过合格评定与到岸检验向GSA依据GS/IEC标准证明，任何无线功能还须取得NCA型号核准。中国CCC或SRRC核准仅证明国内合规，不被GSA或NCA认可。出口商应确认GSA范围、准备GS/IEC证据、核查230 V/50 Hz充电器额定值，并在适用时取得NCA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納不使用CE標誌；鋰電池及行動電源的電氣安全和EMC合規透過合格評定與到岸檢驗向GSA依據GS/IEC標準證明，任何無線功能還須取得NCA型號核准。中國CCC或SRRC核准僅證明國內合規，不被GSA或NCA認可。出口商應確認GSA範圍、準備GS/IEC證據、核查230 V/50 Hz充電器額定值，並在適用時取得NCA型號核准。
